script:
set +e
echo === how do other bots find this module ===
for s in david cameron neil emily; do
  echo "--- $s"
  sudo ls -la /home/$s/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'bot_framework|\.pth$' || echo none
done
echo === check pip ===
python3 -c 'import bot_framework_auth; print(bot_framework_auth.__file__)' 2>&1 || true
echo === sys.path as alejandro ===
sudo -u alejandro python3 -c 'import sys; print(sys.path)'
echo === replace symlink with real copy ===
sudo rm -f /home/alejandro/bot_framework_auth.py
sudo cp /home/azureuser/bot_framework_auth.py /home/alejandro/bot_framework_auth.py
sudo chown alejandro:alejandro /home/alejandro/bot_framework_auth.py
sudo systemctl restart alejandro-bot.service
sleep 8
echo === final state ===
echo "bot=$(systemctl is-active alejandro-bot.service) (restart counter: $(systemctl show alejandro-bot.service -p NRestarts --value))"
sudo journalctl -u alejandro-bot.service -n 6 --no-pager | tail -6
